ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "productid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "businessentityid" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated business entity */,
  "averageleadtime" INTEGER /* Average lead time for product delivery in days */,
  "standardprice" REAL /* Standard price of the product */,
  "lastreceiptcost" REAL /* Cost of the last received product */,
  "lastreceiptdate" TEXT /* Date when the product was last received */,
  "minorderqty" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the product */,
  "maxorderqty" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity for the product */,
  "onorderqty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently on order */,
  "unitmeasurecode" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., CS, CTN, EA) */,
  "modifieddate" TEXT /* Date when the product record was last modified */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit number */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the product manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("productid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_businessentityid FOREIGN KEY ("businessentityid") REFERENCES business_entities ("businessentityid")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_entities" (
  "businessentityid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the business entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of business entity (e.g., supplier, distributor) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the business entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for official communications */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for additional information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("businessentityid")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "orderid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "productid" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "businessentityid" INTEGER /* ID of the business entity supplying the product */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date for product delivery */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_businessentityid FOREIGN KEY ("businessentityid") REFERENCES business_entities ("businessentityid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_productid FOREIGN KEY ("productid") REFERENCES products ("productid")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receiptid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt record */,
  "orderid" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with this receipt */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the products were received */,
  "received_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products received */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the received products */,
  "quality_check_status" TEXT /* Status of quality check */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality inspection was performed */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receiptid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_orderid FOREIGN KEY ("orderid") REFERENCES orders ("orderid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventoryid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "productid" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently on hand */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory alerts */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the product is stored */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for perishable goods */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for traceability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventoryid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_productid FOREIGN KEY ("productid") REFERENCES products ("productid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "userid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "logid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "userid" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., 'added product', 'updated inventory') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_userid FOREIGN KEY ("userid") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)
